allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\dhwns\\.hermes\\gateway_state.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object gateway_state, pid, @{N='slack';E={$_.platforms.slack.state}})

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\dhwns\\.hermes\\gateway_state.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8; $json = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "State: $\($json.gateway_state\)"; Write-Output "PID: $\($json.pid\)"; Write-Output "Slack: $\($json.platforms.slack.state\)")

PowerShell($gatewayCmd = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\hermes\\gateway-service\\Hermes_Gateway.cmd"; $catchupPs1 = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\hermes\\gateway-service\\MorningBriefing_Catchup.ps1"; $markerPs1 = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\hermes\\gateway-service\\MorningBriefing_Marker.ps1"; "Gateway CMD exists: $\(Test-Path $gatewayCmd\)"; "Catchup PS1 exists: $\(Test-Path $catchupPs1\)"; "Marker PS1 exists: $\(Test-Path $markerPs1\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.hermes\\gateway_state.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object pid, gateway_state, updated_at, @{N='slack_state';E={$_.platforms.slack.state}})

PowerShell($task = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName "Hermes_Gateway" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($task\) { "--- Actions ---"; $task.Actions | Select-Object Execute, Arguments, WorkingDirectory | Format-List; "--- Triggers ---"; $task.Triggers | Select-Object CimClass, Delay, Enabled | Format-List; "--- Settings ---"; $task.Settings | Select-Object ExecutionTimeLimit, RestartInterval, RestartCount, AllowStartIfOnBatteries | Format-List; "--- Principal ---"; $task.Principal | Select-Object UserId, LogonType, RunLevel | Format-List } else { "Task not found" })

PowerShell($task = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName "Hermes_Gateway"; $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries = $false; $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries = $false; $task.Actions[0].Execute = "cmd.exe"; $task.Actions[0].Arguments = "/c `"C:\\Users\\dhwns\\AppData\\Local\\hermes\\gateway-service\\Hermes_Gateway.cmd`""; Set-ScheduledTask -InputObject $task | Select-Object TaskName, State; ""; "Updated action:"; $task.Actions | Select-Object Execute, Arguments | Format-List)
